cenas.dalle_prompt: Two calm, well-behaved adult dogs are present. A puppy is on a leash at a safe distance, just observing the other dogs. The owner is rewarding the puppy for calm behavior. Outdoor park setting. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: Static wide shot to establish the safe distance and calm atmosphere. The focus is on observation, not interaction.

cenas.dalle_prompt: A parallel walk: the owner and puppy are walking in the same direction as another person and their calm dog, but on the other side of the path, maintaining a safe distance. Both dogs are on leashes. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A tracking shot from the side, showing both pairs walking in parallel, demonstrating coexistence without direct contact.

cenas.dalle_prompt: The three-second rule: the puppy is allowed a brief, three-second sniff of the other calm dog's rear end, then the owner cheerfully calls the puppy away. A timer graphic counts '1, 2, 3'. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: Close-up on the brief, polite sniffing interaction. The timer graphic appears and a gentle sound indicates when to call the puppy away.

cenas.dalle_prompt: A diagram showing dog body language. Green checkmarks next to: loose body, wagging tail, play bow. Red X's next to: stiff body, raised hackles, growling, fixed stare. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: The good and bad body language examples animate, with the checkmarks and X's appearing to clearly label them.

cenas.dalle_prompt: Final shot of the puppy and the other dog lying down calmly near each other, but not interacting, both relaxed. Text overlay: 'Amizades Seguras Começam com Respeito'. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A peaceful, static shot of the two dogs coexisting calmly. The text fades in with a gentle, respectful font.
